title: cotylephora altissima
intro: Cotylephora altissima, also known as the giant Cotylephora, is a species of lichenized fungus in the family Collemataceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cotylephora altissima include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Cotylephora altissima can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
